recent_excerpts: A critical vulnerability in the Flowise AI platform and other frameworks using Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables remote code execution.
Syncthing versions before 1.28.0 contain a critical vulnerability, CVE-2026-XXXXX, enabling remote code execution on the Syncthing relay server infrastructure.
A critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-32861) in NI LabVIEW allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code by tricking a user into opening a malicious LVCLASS file, with a CVSS score of 7.8.
